summary: Created tsconfig.json with ES2022 target, NodeNext module/moduleResolution, strict mode, dist/ outDir, and **/* include. Created src/index.ts with export {} as empty project marker.
Created jest.config.js with @swc/jest transform scoped to tests/unit/**/*.test.ts. Added test:unit script to package.json. Created passing sanity test at tests/unit/setup.test.ts.

Created playwright.config.ts with headless Chromium, baseURL http://localhost:3000, testDir ./tests/e2e. Created sanity test at tests/e2e/setup.spec.ts navigating to about:blank and asserting empty title. Added test:e2e script and updated test script to run test:unit && test:e2e sequentially.
